title: Is there any recent info on the US 333 release date
display_title: Is there any recent info on the US 333 release date
wikitext:
[]: Is there any recent info on the US 3.33 release date? Post by TheMightySM » Fri Feb 07, 2014 3:15 am I've scoured the internet. I've even tried using the search function on here (excuse my poor skills with forum search tools). Everything that I have found is dated to last year or January and the most recent things just say it's been delayed for the sake of the theatre screenings It's already February 7th, which is pretty close to the original intended release date of February 18th. So if anyone has any information or the inside scoop that'd be awesome if you could share! I'm becoming very impatient, especially since they decided to delay the release date of the Blu-Ray for theatre screenings which are few and far between and none of which are near me. All the dates on the theatre website have also passed. So what the heck? I want to give you my money Funimation...

[]: Post by pwhodges » Fri Feb 07, 2014 3:24 am The UK has a new date delayed five months from the original one; if that reflects the expected availability from Funimation, then you're looking at July (as we're looking at August).

[]: Post by Dataprime » Fri Feb 07, 2014 10:21 am Yeah, Funimation has the date still listed as TBA 2014 :( But I'm keeping my eyes glued to their Twitter account for announcements.

[]: Re: Is there any recent info on the US 3.33 release date? Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Feb 07, 2014 10:21 am TheMightySM wrote: the most recent things just say it's been delayed for the sake of the theatre screenings

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Aug 13, 2014 10:17 pm Just gonna bump this since it's the closest thing I can find regarding updates: Somebody from an Amazon U.S. Eva 3.0 forum discussion: [url]http://www.fandompost.com/oldforums/showthread.php?34386-FUNimation-November-December-2014-Solicitations[/url] Funimation's already got their November schedule up, and still no 3.33...I'm begrudgingly resigned to the notion that we'll probably not going see it released this year. I only hope that Studio Khara realizes they're just shooting themselves in the foot the longer they keep delaying this for reasons that still don't make any sense beyond them wanting an obsessive level of control over a product that more than likely didn't need any "fine-tuning" (assuming the whole "it needed to be redubbed" angle holds any truth).

I'm becoming very impatient, especially since they decided to delay the release date of the Blu-Ray for theatre screenings which are few and far between and none of which are near me. Article: Is there any recent info on the US 333 release date
 Funimation's already got their November schedule up, and still no 3.33...I'm begrudgingly resigned to the notion that we'll probably not going see it released this year. I only hope that Studio Khara realizes they're just shooting themselves in the foot the longer they keep delaying this for reasons that still don't make any sense beyond them wanting an obsessive level of control over a product that more than likely didn't need any "fine-tuning" (assuming the whole "it needed to be redubbed" angle holds any truth).
